sections.paragraph: <entryFree id="n68670" key="mono/sxhmos" type="main" opt="n" TEIform="entryFree"> <orth extent="suff" lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="orth">μονό-σχημος</orth>, <itype lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="itype">ον</itype>, <sense id="n68670.0" n="A" level="1" opt="n" TEIform="sense"> <tr_ opt="n" TEIform="tr">employing one figure</tr_>, <bibl n="urn:cts:greekLit:tlg2596.tlg001:1:1" default="NO" TEIform="bibl"> <author TEIform="author">Phoeb.</author> <title_ TEIform="title">Fig.</title_> <biblScope TEIform="biblScope">1.1</biblScope> </bibl>; <foreign lang="greek" TEIform="foreign">τὸ μ.</foreign> ibid.</sense> </entryFree>
